class.name: lai_franka_controllers/CartesianVelocityController
class.description: Analytical Jacobian Damped Pseudo-Inverse Task-Space Velocity Controller using Pinocchio.

class.name: lai_franka_controllers/HqpCartesianVelocityController
class.description: Legacy Real-Time Multi-Priority Hierarchical QP Cartesian Controller using Gurobi.

class.name: lai_franka_controllers/JointPdVelocityController
class.description: Low-Level Real-Time Safe Joint Space PD Controller with Velocity Feedforward and Watchdog Protection.
